title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report March 08 2023
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report March 08 2023
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report March 08 2023
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 08/03/2023
DCE iron ore futures rose by 0.83% today, the main contract closed at 912.The traders' willingness to ship is less.The steel mills are waitand see. The overall trading senƟment of the market is worse.PBF at Shandong port deal 918-920 yuan/mt,increase 1-4yuan/ mt;PBF at Tangshan port deal 930-935 yuan/mt,increase 2 yuan/mt. As of today, according to SMM, the operaƟng rate of blast furnace has remained stable on a month-on-month basis, the uƟlizaƟon rate of blast furnace capacity has increased on a month-on-month basis, and the daily average iron output of steel mills has increased slightly.
